hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.java$'; then for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if grep -nE '^\s*//|/\*' "$f" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Comments detected in $f — code must have no comments. Review and remove."; fi; if grep -nE '\b(proveedor|usuario|orden|comprobante|factura|pago|cheque|impuesto|nombre|cantidad|fecha|estado)\b' "$f" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Spanish identifiers detected in $f — code must be in English (Spanish allowed only in user-facing strings)."; fi; done; fi
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo '📝 You have uncommitted changes. Consider committing the completed item before moving on.'; fi
